projectName: Vite + React + TypeScript + Tailwind + shadcn/ui Template
projectDescription: A minimal, production-oriented React starter template combining Vite, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, shadcn/ui primitives, and declarative React Router DOM routing.
keyFeatures: Vite + rolldown-vite for lightning-fast dev server and builds
React 19 with TypeScript for type-safe component development
Tailwind CSS v4 utility-first styling with @tailwindcss/vite plugin
shadcn/ui primitives (Button, Card, Input) with Radix UI and CVA
React Router DOM v7 with declarative object-based route definitions
@ path alias resolving to src/ for clean imports
ESLint configured for React hooks and TypeScript
Shared Layout component with Navigation and Outlet
publicApiSurface: Button — variants: default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link; sizes: default, sm, lg, icon
Card, CardHeader, CardTitle, CardDescription, CardAction, CardContent, CardFooter
cn() — clsx + tailwind-merge utility for conditional class merging
Layout — shared shell with Navigation and react-router-dom Outlet
